error_message: cannot borrow `*p` as mutable, as it is behind a `&` reference
error_snippet:
|
6 |     p.set_zero();
  |     ^ `p` is a `&` reference, so it cannot be borrowed as mutable
  |
help: `Polynomial` doesn't implement `Clone`, so this call clones the reference `&Polynomial`
 --> c_aces/src/bin/polynomial_test.rs:5:22
  |
5 |     let mut p = poly.clone();
  |                      ^^^^^^^
help: consider specifying this binding's type
  |
5 |     let mut p: &mut Polynomial = poly.clone();
  |              +++++++++++++++++

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0596`.
